metadata.title: Instrument Rating Curriculum - Accelerated
metadata.description: Focused IFR training curriculum for pilots with PPL

studyItems.name: IFR Currency Requirements
studyItems.evaluationCriteria: Explains 6-6-HIT requirements and methods to maintain currency

studyItems.name: METAR/TAF Interpretation
studyItems.description: Decoding and applying weather reports for IFR operations
studyItems.evaluationCriteria: Accurately decodes METARs/TAFs and determines IFR alternate requirements

studyItems.name: GPS/RNAV Operations
studyItems.description: WAAS GPS operations including approach procedures
studyItems.evaluationCriteria: Programs and flies GPS approaches, understands RAIM and WAAS

lessonPlans.title: IFR Regulations Review
lessonPlans.motivation: Understanding IFR regulations is essential for safe and legal instrument flight
objectives: Know when an alternate is required
lessonPlans.planDescription: Comprehensive ground lesson covering Part 91 IFR regulations

lessonPlans.title: Weather Products and Decision Making
lessonPlans.motivation: Weather is the leading factor in IFR accidents - proper interpretation saves lives
lessonPlans.planDescription: Interactive weather briefing practice with real-world scenarios

lessonPlans.title: GPS Approach Procedures
lessonPlans.motivation: GPS approaches are becoming the primary approach type at many airports
lessonPlans.planDescription: Practice multiple GPS approaches with various minimums and missed approach procedures
lessonPlans.preStudyHomework: Review GPS manual supplement in POH
